interpretation_rule: PH908 source adequacy would need a source-side expansion to reach basic source adequacy under the primary YFull layer.
PH908 source adequacy would need a source-side expansion to reach the less stringent primary matched R1a source-adequacy floor.
PH908 source q2 would need to increase to move the primary diversity contrast below zero if receiver diversity remained fixed.
PH908 source q2 would need to increase to reach the less stringent primary matched R1a diversity ceiling if receiver diversity remained fixed.
